introSection: Crazy 8 is a steel spinning kiddie indoor roller coaster located at San Antonio's Incredible Pizza Company in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It originally opened on July 22, 2017 at FunXcess. It would close here in March 2020.
fullText:
Crazy 8 is a steel spinning kiddie indoor roller coaster located at San Antonio's Incredible Pizza Company in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It originally opened on July 22, 2017 at FunXcess. It would close here in March 2020.



Each row sits back-to-back.
